name: U.S. Bank Visa® Platinum Card

earning_rates.category: Prepaid air, hotel, car reservations (Travel Center)
earning_rates.notes: 4% cash back on prepaid travel booked directly via U.S. Bank Travel Center

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $600 reimbursed if cell phone is stolen or damaged when paying monthly cellular bill with card

other_benefits.name: ExtendedPay Plan
other_benefits.description: One 3-month $0 fee ExtendPay Plan annually after intro APR offer expires

other_benefits.name: Free credit score access
other_benefits.description: View credit score anytime via mobile app or online banking

sources.notes: Official U.S. Bank page (redirects to shield-visa)

notes: Card URL redirects to U.S. Bank Shield Visa. May have been rebranded or is the same product. 0% intro APR for 21 billing cycles on purchases and balance transfers. Ideal for those seeking low APR and cell phone protection rather than rewards.

recurring_credits.name: $20 annual statement credit
recurring_credits.description: $20 credit for 11 consecutive months of purchases (requires enrolled in U.S. Bank ExtendPay)
